security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Free SOCKS5 proxy manager with auto-rotation
bundle.longDescription: Relay finds free SOCKS5 proxies, tests them for speed, and runs a local proxy server with automatic upstream rotation.
